title: chorizanthe brevicornu var. brevicornu
intro: Chorizanthe brevicornu var. brevicornu, also known as the Short-horned maravilla, is a species of flowering plant in the family Polygonaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and even exhibiting antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of Chorizanthe brevicornu var. brevicornu can be made from the plant's leaves and stems, which can be dried, powdered, or infused in teas to utilize its medicinal properties.
